channel.title: Gtk3 on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Gtk3 on Arrans github.io

item.title: xournalpp/xournalpp
item.description: Xournal++ is a handwriting notetaking software with PDF annotation support. Written in C++ with GTK3, supporting Linux (e.g. Ubuntu, Debian, Arch, SUSE), macOS and Windows 10. Supports pen input from devices such as Wacom Tablets.

item.title: uowuo/abaddon
item.description: An alternative Discord client with voice support made with C++ and GTK 3

item.title: gnunn1/tilix
item.description: A tiling terminal emulator for Linux using GTK+ 3

item.title: xeco23/WasIstLos
item.description: An unofficial WhatsApp desktop application for Linux.
